datasets.name: 8fba07e7
queryLines:
SELECT
  Date,
  Turnover_cr
FROM
  gold_table
ORDER BY
  Date

datasets.name: c5c49ff5
queryLines: SELECT * FROM gold_catalog.gold_schema.gold_table

columns.description: Daily price spread: High minus Low
Average of Open, High, Low, Close

datasets.name: 27ee08ca
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', Date) AS Month,
  AVG(Open) AS Avg_Open,
  AVG(High) AS Avg_High,
  AVG(Low) AS Avg_Low,
  AVG(Close) AS Avg_Close,
  AVG(shares_traded) AS Avg_Shares_Traded,
  AVG(Turnover_cr) AS Avg_Turnover_Cr
FROM
  gold_catalog.gold_schema.gold_table
GROUP BY
  DATE_TRUNC('month', Date)
ORDER BY
  Month

datasets.name: fcd410c2
queryLines:
SELECT
  Date,
  Close,
  ROUND(
    (Close - LAG(Close) OVER (ORDER BY Date)) / LAG(Close) OVER (ORDER BY Date) * 100,
    2
  ) AS pct_change
FROM
  gold_catalog.gold_schema.gold_table
ORDER BY
  Date

datasets.name: ef7d0491
queryLines:
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', Date) AS week,
  FIRST(Open) AS week_open,
  MAX(High) AS week_high,
  MIN(Low) AS week_low,
  LAST(Close) AS week_close
FROM
  gold_catalog.gold_schema.gold_table
GROUP BY
  date_trunc('week', Date)
ORDER BY
  week

datasets.name: 326798d2
queryLines:
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', Date) AS week,
  SUM(shares_traded) AS total_volume
FROM
  gold_catalog.gold_schema.gold_table
GROUP BY
  date_trunc('week', Date)
ORDER BY
  week

datasets.name: 68aea563
queryLines:
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', Date) AS week,
  SUM(Turnover_cr) AS total_turnover
FROM
  gold_catalog.gold_schema.gold_table
GROUP BY
  date_trunc('week', Date)
ORDER BY
  week

datasets.name: adfaeecd
queryLines:
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', Date) AS week,
  ROUND(AVG(Close), 2) AS avg_close
FROM
  gold_catalog.gold_schema.gold_table
GROUP BY
  date_trunc('week', Date)
ORDER BY
  week

datasets.name: e105599d
queryLines:
SELECT
  date_trunc('month', Date) AS month,
  FIRST(Open) AS month_open,
  MAX(High) AS month_high,
  MIN(Low) AS month_low,
  LAST(Close) AS month_close
FROM
  gold_catalog.gold_schema.gold_table
GROUP BY
  date_trunc('month', Date)
ORDER BY
  month

datasets.name: 655685df
queryLines:
SELECT
  date_trunc('month', Date) AS month,
  SUM(shares_traded) AS total_volume
FROM
  gold_catalog.gold_schema.gold_table
GROUP BY
  date_trunc('month', Date)
ORDER BY
  month

datasets.name: 3d56ff4d
queryLines:
SELECT
  Date,
  Open,
  High,
  Low,
  Close,
  shares_traded AS Volume,
  Turnover_cr AS Turnover,
  (Open + High + Low + Close) / 4 AS Avg_Price
FROM
  gold_table
ORDER BY
  Date DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: ee48affd
queryLines: SELECT * FROM nifty_catalog.nifty_schema.gold_nifty

SELECT
  date,
  symbol,
  open,
  high,
  low,
  close,
  volume
FROM
  silver_data
WHERE
  symbol = :symbol_param
ORDER BY
  date DESC

datasets.name: caa778de
queryLines:
SELECT
  year(date) AS year,
  symbol,
  FIRST(open) AS year_open,
  MAX(high) AS year_high,
  MIN(low) AS year_low,
  LAST(close) AS year_close,
  SUM(volume) AS total_volume
FROM
  silver_data
WHERE
  symbol = :symbol_param
GROUP BY
  year(date),
  symbol
ORDER BY
  year DESC

datasets.name: e6e329fb
queryLines:
SELECT
  year(date) AS year,
  symbol,
  AVG(open) AS avg_open,
  AVG(high) AS avg_high,
  AVG(low) AS avg_low,
  AVG(close) AS avg_close,
  SUM(volume) AS total_volume
FROM
  silver_data
WHERE
  symbol = :symbol_param
GROUP BY
  year(date),
  symbol
ORDER BY
  year DESC

datasets.name: c1eba5fa
queryLines:
SELECT
  year(date) AS year,
  weekofyear(date) AS week,
  symbol,
  FIRST(open) AS week_open,
  MAX(high) AS week_high,
  MIN(low) AS week_low,
  LAST(close) AS week_close,
  SUM(volume) AS week_volume,
  AVG(close) AS avg_week_close
FROM
  silver_data
WHERE
  symbol = :symbol_param
GROUP BY
  year(date),
  weekofyear(date),
  symbol
ORDER BY
  year DESC,
  week DESC

datasets.name: 21c03390
queryLines:
SELECT
    date,
    close,
    volume
FROM nifty_catalog.nifty_schema.gold_nifty
WHERE symbol = '${symbol_param}'
ORDER BY date;

datasets.name: e593ddcb
queryLines: FROM ( VALUES ('RELIANCE'), ('TCS'), ('INFY'), ('HDFCBANK'), ('ICICIBANK'), ('SBIN'), ('ITC'), ('LT') ) AS domain(values) SELECT values

datasets.name: d3d02cfc
queryLines:
SELECT
  date,
  symbol,
  open,
  high,
  low,
  close,
  volume
FROM
  nifty_catalog.nifty_schema.gold_nifty
WHERE
  symbol = '${symbol_param}'
ORDER BY
  date

datasets.name: 5721b558
queryLines:
SELECT
  concat(year(date), '-W', weekofyear(date)) AS year_week,
  symbol,
  AVG(close) AS avg_week_price,
  SUM(volume) AS week_volume
FROM
  nifty_catalog.nifty_schema.gold_nifty
WHERE
  symbol = '${symbol_param}'
GROUP BY
  year(date),
  weekofyear(date),
  symbol
ORDER BY
  year_week

datasets.name: a83da13f
queryLines:
SELECT
  concat(year(date), '-', lpad(month(date), 2, '0')) AS symbol_month,
  symbol,
  MIN_BY(open, date) AS month_open,
  MAX(high) AS month_high,
  MIN(low) AS month_low,
  MAX_BY(close, date) AS month_close,
  SUM(volume) AS month_volume
FROM
  nifty_catalog.nifty_schema.gold_nifty
WHERE
  symbol = :symbol_param
GROUP BY
  year(date),
  month(date),
  symbol
ORDER BY
  year(date),
  month(date)

datasets.name: 50c9496a
queryLines:
SELECT
  concat(year(date), '-', lpad(month(date), 2, '0')) AS year_month,
  symbol,
  AVG(close) AS avg_month_close,
  MAX(high) AS month_high,
  MIN(low) AS month_low,
  SUM(volume) AS month_volume
FROM
  nifty_catalog.nifty_schema.gold_nifty
WHERE
  symbol = :symbol_param
GROUP BY
  year(date),
  month(date),
  symbol
ORDER BY
  year_month

datasets.name: 4d42e78c
queryLines:
SELECT
  symbol,
  AVG(close) AS avg_price,
  MAX(high) AS highest_price,
  MIN(low) AS lowest_price,
  SUM(volume) AS total_traded_volume
FROM
  nifty_catalog.nifty_schema.gold_nifty
WHERE
  upper(symbol) = upper('${symbol_param}')
GROUP BY
  symbol

datasets.name: 804000f7
queryLines:
SELECT
  symbol,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', date) AS month,
  AVG(close) AS avg_close_price,
  MAX(high) AS max_price,
  MIN(low) AS min_price,
  SUM(volume) AS total_volume
FROM
  nifty_catalog.nifty_schema.gold_nifty
WHERE
  symbol = '${symbol_param}'
GROUP BY
  symbol,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', date)
ORDER BY
  month

datasets.name: cccefeb6
queryLines: SELECT * FROM nifty_catalog.nifty_schema.gold_nifty

datasets.name: 9d5789b5
queryLines:
SELECT
  symbol,
  date,
  AVG(close) AS avg_close_price,
  MAX(high) AS max_price,
  MIN(low) AS min_price,
  SUM(volume) AS total_volume
FROM
  nifty_catalog.nifty_schema.gold_nifty
WHERE
  symbol = :symbol_param
GROUP BY
  symbol,
  date
ORDER BY
  date
